institution.name: Caldwell Community College and Technical Institute

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Caldwell Community College and Technical Institute fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (8.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Caldwell Community College and Technical Institute rose 67% between 2006 and 2009 (14.5% → 24.3%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Caldwell Community College and Technical Institute fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.7k → $6.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Caldwell Community College and Technical Institute rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (59.1% → 70.6%).
